name: brightspace-student-hub
description: Unified access to D2L Brightspace (Learn), Crowdmark, and Piazza. Fetch announcements, deadlines, grades, files, and Piazza posts without logging in manually.

interface.shortDescription: Access Learn, Crowdmark, and Piazza without logging in manually
interface.longDescription: Automated access to D2L Brightspace and optional integrations (Crowdmark, Piazza) via cookie-based Python scripts. Supports any Brightspace institution. Features: announcements, deadlines, file downloads with conflict detection, Crowdmark grades with per-question feedback, Piazza search and unread counts, weekly cross-platform summary. First-time setup guided automatically.
defaultPrompt: Download all ECE 380 files from Learn.
